case_title: HASSAN, ANIKA vs. SOLARIO, FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1994, OFF CALENDAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-19-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, ANIKA AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARIO, FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-30-1994

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-19-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-19-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-18-1994 CONTINUED FROM OCT-19-1994 TO NOV-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
